title: Family Fun At The Spiegelgardens
description: The whole family is invited to celebrate in style as we kick off Brighton Fringe 2026. Join us for a fun-filled afternoon of performances and free activities outside in the beautiful SpiegelGardens glade. The SpiegelPub will be open for a refreshing drink in the sunshine or a well-deserved sit-down after the Children’s Parade! Expect stilt walkers, face-painters, balloon modelling and live performances. For little ones who fancy a post-nap boogie, Dinki Disco will keep the tunes pumping in the Spiegeltent followed by Fringe favourite, The Giant Balloon Show - fun for all the family (tickets available to book separately).
